org.docgene.model

Class XMLCitation

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.docgene.model.AbstractLink
      • org.docgene.model.XMLCitation
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ElementReference, ExternalLink, NoteContent, ParagraphElement, StyledElement

    public class XMLCitation
extends AbstractLink
implements NoteContent
    Represent the content of a "cite" element.

      • Fields inherited from class org.docgene.model.AbstractLink
